description_long: This is a large, modern house with a flat roof and a multi-level design, featuring expansive outdoor living spaces including a swimming pool, sun loungers, and landscaped gardens with flowering trees. The structure is composed of clean, geometric lines and a mix of white, gray, and beige exterior finishes, with large glass windows and sliding doors that provide ample natural light. The front area includes a wide driveway and a garage, while the rear showcases a luxurious pool deck with shaded cabanas and outdoor dining areas. The house is surrounded by paved walkways, green lawns, and decorative shrubbery, creating a seamless transition between indoor and outdoor spaces. The architectural style emphasizes open-plan living, with terraces and balconies overlooking the pool and garden. The overall impression is one of contemporary elegance, comfort, and functionality, suitable for upscale urban or suburban neighborhoods.
description: A spacious, modern flat-roofed house with large windows, landscaped gardens, a pool, and multiple outdoor living areas. The design features clean lines, open spaces, and a mix of white, gray, and beige finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main driveway, garage, and landscaped entry with flowering trees and paved surfaces.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the pool area, sun loungers, outdoor dining, and green lawn with trees.
description_view_2: Back view focusing on the pool deck, shaded cabanas, and the multi-level terrace structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional garage access, paved walkways, and more landscaped greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Wide, understated entry with a flat overhang, large glass door, and landscaped approach with flowering trees and paved driveway
